title: The Leonardo Collection Thistle Mug Jennifer Rose Gallery for Hot & Cold Drinks | Durable Coffee Cups for Home & Office | Comfortable & Easy-to-Hold Coffee Mugs for Beverages & Daily Use
features: Elegant Coffee Cup with Botanical Thistle Design: Showcasing a delicate thistle illustration by Jennifer Rose, this ceramic coffee mug adds a refined touch of nature-inspired elegance to your daily sipping ritual.

Durable Ceramic for Everyday Enjoyment: Made with premium ceramic, this coffee cup is strong and long-lasting, ideal for frequent use in the home or office, with a sturdy handle for secure, comfortable holding.
Perfect Size for Hot and Cold Beverages: Designed to hold your favourite drinks, this mug is perfect for tea, coffee, hot chocolate or chilled refreshments, making it versatile for any time of day.

Stylish Mug for Kitchen and Office Use: With its charming floral artwork and practical shape, this mug fits beautifully into modern or traditional cup collections and enhances any kitchen or workspace setting.
Thoughtful Gift for Nature or Tea Lovers: A great gift idea for birthdays, housewarmings or festive occasions, this mug delights anyone who enjoys floral motifs and a peaceful tea or coffee break.
